sections.paragraph:
Original: עוּים

Transliteration: ‛avviym

Phonetic: av-veem'

BDB Definition:

Avim = "ruins"
  1. a people among the early inhabitants of Palestine located in the southwest corner of the seacoast (noun proper masculine)
  2. a city in Benjamin (noun proper locative)

Origin: pl of H5757

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
